title: Airlab 2X Large Microfibre Car Cleaning Cloths 90x60cm XXL, 500GSM Dual-Sided Drying Towels for Auto Detailing, Motorcycles Polishing, Vehicles Washing, Lint-Free Streak-Free Highly Absorbent
features: Dry More With Just One Towel: Our 23.6'' x 35.4'' (60cmx90cm) Airlab microfiber car drying towel is our large premium drying towel. It's large enough to dry an entire car in just one pass, while being economically priced
Unmatched Drying Capacity: It's made from 500 GSM split microfiber that's an 80% Polyester / 20% Polyamide blend. The Heavy Weight Microfiber can absorb over 1 gallon of water
Say Goodbye to Streaks: The great absorbent drying towel leave no streaks or lint behind, leave your car's finish spotless and streak-free
Long Lasting Performance: The microfiber towels for cars is machine washable. When cared for properly our car cleaning towels can last hundreds of washings, saving you money in the long run
Ultra Plush Premium Microfibers: The ultra fine microfiber will not scratch the finest of surfaces. Picks up all excess dirt and grime, giving you the perfect car shine
description: Product Description Airlab Microfiber Drying Towels Airlab Microfiber Car Cleaning Towel stands out from other drying cloths for its consistently smooth finish, its soft touch and its professional detailing performance. Premium brand, premium product We maintain the very highest standards in everything we do, combining traditional techniques , with modern processes, to ensure you will receive a premium quality product. Why Should Choose Airlab Microfiber Drying Towels? For anyone who likes to drive clean, Airlab Car Drying Towel is a indispensable product. Airlab reusable microfiber cleaning cloths are perfect for washing, drying vehicles Airlab Microfiber Drying Towels are not only suitable for cleaning cars, motorcycles, but also for homes, gyms and animals. Soft and Super Absorbent No Scratches No Fading Lint and Streak Free Enduring and Reusable Multi-Functions Use Why Do You Need Airlab Microfiber Drying Towels? The Airlab Microfiber Drying Towel is in huge size of 35.4’’ x 23.6’’ so you can dry your car fast! The premium microfiber, non-abrasive, smooth edges, and huge size all work in unison to dry without scratching or swirling paint! The Drying Towel absorbs over a gallon of water off the surface of any vehicle for a streak-free shine after a wash. Use the Towel on your paint, glass, wheels, trim, truck beds, cars, RVs, boats, or for drying any wet surface around your home! DRY FAST Plush Microfiber Easily Glides Across the Paint Surface. GENTLE DRYING The ultra fine microfiber will not scratch the finest of surfaces. ULTIMATE CLEANING TOOL The fastest and easiest way to dry any size car or truck- you'll only need one towel!
